Dosage

Vivitrol comes as an injection (shot) thats given into a muscle of your buttocks by a healthcare professional.

What is Vivitrols dosage?

The recommended dosage and dosing schedule for Vivitrol are described below.

What is Vivitrols form?

Vivitrol comes as a vial of powder that is mixed with a certain liquid to create a solution.

What should be done in case of overdose?

Your doctor will determine the correct dosage of Vivitrol for you. There are limited data about overdose with Vivitrol. High

If an overdose of Vivitrol occurs, your doctor will determine whether you need treatment for any symptoms.
